picks.quote: I think you're right. The size, the speed, the agility, the natural um the fight IQ is all in favor of Ciryl Gane, I think.
I'm going to say Ilia Topuria. It's going to be a How? He's going to punch him.
Derrick Lewis probably going to beat Sean Garcia... If Derrick Lewis can spark Josh with the one shot, that's going to blow people's minds.
Sugar Sean O'Malley is probably going to beat Amasov and Harvey. Look at what Sean did to Cheeto Vera.
